name: 经济一体化
subject: economics
domain_name: 全球经济 / Global Economy / Global Economy
curriculum_points: Students will be able to explain the different forms of economic integration, from preferential trade agreements to monetary unions, using real-world examples.
Students will be able to evaluate the potential economic benefits (e.g., trade creation) and costs (e.g., trade diversion, loss of sovereignty) of regional economic integration.
